title: Fix admin delete permission check blocking admin users

requirements.text: Fix the admin role check in the delete member flow so that authenticated admin users can successfully delete members without seeing the 'only admin can delete' error message. The permission guard must correctly identify the current user as admin before blocking the action.

quotes: Prompting message only admin can delete
As admin I am trying still it's prompting message only admin can delete

acceptanceCriteria: When logged in as an admin, clicking the delete member button does NOT show 'only admin can delete' or any unauthorized error message.
The delete confirmation dialog appears correctly for admin users.
Confirming deletion in the dialog successfully calls the backend deleteMember function and removes the member.
Non-admin users still see an appropriate access-denied message when attempting to delete.
The backend role check for deleteMember correctly validates admin principal/role before rejecting the request.

constraints: Do not change the overall AdminPanel layout or other admin features.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding new admin features or changing the member management UI beyond the delete fix.
Changing the commission or MLM tree logic.
